name: @openai/codex-plugin-cc
description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p plugins/codex/.generated/app-server-types && codex app-server generate-ts --out plugins/codex/.generated/app-server-types
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --configLoader runner tests/state.test.mjs tests/bump-version.test.mjs tests/render.test.mjs tests/git.test.mjs tests/args.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: vitest run --configLoader runner tests/broker-death.test.mjs tests/broker-endpoint.test.mjs tests/commands.test.mjs tests/continue-streaming.test.mjs tests/control-plane.test.mjs tests/goals.test.mjs tests/job-reaper.test.mjs tests/job-visibility.test.mjs tests/native-visibility.integration.test.mjs tests/parallel-jobs.test.mjs tests/permissions.test.mjs tests/process.test.mjs tests/runtime.test.mjs tests/strict-args-worktrees.test.mjs tests/turn-reconciliation.test.mjs
